arts.ttl: “We must have the right attitude to win”: Fonseca prepares AC Milan for Slovan Bratislava
arts.sum: In a press conference held at the National Stadium in Bratislava, Milan coach Paulo Fonseca addressed the upcoming match against Slovan. Speaking to the gathered press, the Portuguese tactician acknowledged the challenges his team faces in maintaining focus against lower-ranked opponents. He expressed concerns about the potential for underestimating the opposition, stating, “We have talked about how important it is to win tomorrow. arts.ttl: Kucka reflects on Leao and Milan: “I thought Leao wouldn’t go far, but now he’s a great player”
arts.sum: Juraj Kucka, former AC Milan player and current Slovan Bratislava midfielder, shared his thoughts in a press conference before the UEFA Champions League match between Slovan Bratislava and the Rossoneri. The match is set for the fifth day of the group stage, and Kucka expressed his excitement about facing his former club. When asked about his current condition, Kucka said, “I feel good. I’ve been training regularly for over a week and played a half on Saturday. I’m looking forward to the game, as is the rest of the team.
